content:
(1) The Randomizer – Once per game, rolls dice to change an event’s outcome. (2) The Unbound – Cannot be locked into factions.
The Wild Card introduces unpredictability to the game.


📜 Why This Works:
✔ Strengthens role-playing mechanics—students have distinct, thematic duties.
✔ Ensures varied decision-making strategies.
✔ Aligns in-game advantages with character identity.

📜 2. Professor’s Secret Rolls – Determining Hidden Class Mechanics

📜 The professor (you) will perform all secret rolls and hidden class operations.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 401 (chunk 401/555)
